summary: Frontend-only PWA testing for Suzuki SellWise /leads (Screen 2 - My Leads). 14 of 15 scenarios pass. Welcome → /leads navigation, all data-testids, tab state with URL query sync, reload persistence, 4 human + 4 AI lead cards with correct names/priorities/tags/recommended-pill placement, schedule-ai-accordion toggle, bottom nav colors (white active / #659df2 inactive), SuzukiPro on page-title and Maison Neue on body, EN→ID translation with localStorage persistence, and manifest/service-worker all verified. ONE UI bug found: horizontal overflow (436px vs 412px viewport) when language=id because longer Indonesian tab labels plus whitespace-nowrap push tab-ai past the right edge.

ui_bugs.issue: At viewport 412x900 in Indonesian, leads-tabs forces horizontal overflow: leads-screen.scrollWidth=436 > clientWidth=412. tab-human width=219px, tab-ai width=181px (+12px gap + 48px container px-6) = 460px needed vs 412px available. whitespace-nowrap prevents shrink. In English this does not occur (tab-ai right=388px, no overflow). Visually 'Tindak Lanjut AI' badge clips past the right edge.

issues: leads-tabs row causes horizontal scroll on mobile; consider reducing px-2.5 → px-2, removing count badge padding, using text-[12px], or allowing the label to shrink with min-w-0 + truncate when lang=id.

action_items: Fix /leads horizontal overflow at 412 width when language=id: shrink TabButton padding/label/count badge or use overflow-hidden + truncate on the label span. Target: leads-screen.scrollWidth <= 412 at 412-wide viewport in both EN and ID.
critical_code_review_comments: BottomNav.jsx L31: onClick={() => path !== pathname && path === '/leads' && navigate(path)} silently does nothing for nav-perform/nav-guide/nav-analyze. Fine today (those routes do not exist) but will become a confusing no-op bug as soon as the other screens land. Replace with `if (path !== pathname) navigate(path)` once routes exist.
Leads.jsx ScheduleAiAccordion only renders a placeholder string ('AI follow-up scheduling will appear here once configured.') — acceptable for MVP screen 2 but flagged as not-yet-implemented content.
TabButton uses whitespace-nowrap with flex-1: this is the root cause of the Indonesian overflow. Needs min-w-0 + truncate or responsive sizing to support localized labels.

LeadCard.jsx renders an invisible <span h-[18px]> spacer when recommendedAction is not 'call' / 'whatsapp' — works but could be handled with flex alignment rather than a magic-number spacer for easier maintenance.

No visible difference between 'tag pills use Maison Neue' vs SuzukiPro on page-title — this is correct per spec, only noting that Welcome.jsx also uses font-suzuki on headline/cards while per the request-note 'page-title is the only element using SuzukiPro on Screen 2'. Welcome screen usage is unchanged from iteration_1 and out of scope here.

success_rate.frontend: 93% (14/15 scenarios pass; 1 HIGH UI overflow bug in ID)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All /leads requirements verified at viewport 412x900: leads-screen, app-header with brand 'SellWise', lang-icon-button, header-search-btn, header-profile-btn, page-title='My Leads' (SuzukiPro), leads-tabs with tab-human (default aria-pressed=true) and tab-ai, URL syncs to ?tab=ai on click and on reload of /leads?tab=ai. Human cards h1..h4 render with correct names (Marcus Thompson high, Jennifer Ramirez medium, David Chen low, Samantha Williams low) and recommended-pill appears under the correct action button (h1→call, h2→whatsapp, h3→whatsapp, h4→call). AI cards a1..a4 (William Lucas, Carlos Gomez, Muhammad, Aisha Rahman) each render a move-to-human-{id} button with text 'Move to Human'. schedule-ai-accordion opens/closes (schedule-ai-content not in DOM when closed). Bottom nav colors: nav-leads=rgb(255,255,255), nav-perform/guide/analyze=rgb(101,157,242)=#659df2. Fonts computed: title='SuzukiPro, "Maison Neue", sans-serif'; body='"Maison Neue", ...'. Language switch via lang-icon-button→lang-icon-option-id renders 'Prospek Saya' and 'Tindak Lanjut Manusia' and localStorage 'sellwise.lang'='id' persists across reload. /manifest.json and /service-worker.js both 200. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://frontend-forge-25.preview.emergentagent.com. The single open issue is horizontal overflow on the tabs row in Indonesian at 412px wide — when fix lands, re-run overflow + tab-label wrap assertions.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of ID overflow: TabButton uses `flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap` in /app/frontend/src/pages/Leads.jsx. With Indonesian labels 'Tindak Lanjut Manusia' (tab width 219px) and 'Tindak Lanjut AI' (tab width 181px) plus a 12px gap and px-6 container padding (48px total), total required width = 460px exceeds the 412px viewport. whitespace-nowrap prevents the label from wrapping or shrinking, so the flex parent exceeds its allocated width and the document scrollWidth grows to 436. Reproduction: set localStorage.sellwise.lang='id', reload /leads at viewport 412x900, observe document.documentElement.scrollWidth=436 and tab-ai boundingClientRect.right=436. Mitigations: (a) add min-w-0 on TabButton and truncate on the label span, (b) reduce px-3 to px-2 and text-[13px] to text-[12px] when lang=id, or (c) reduce gap-3 to gap-2 and container px-6 to px-4.
